---
title: New eScience paper on N-doped graphene for lithium-sulfur batteries
date: 2025-11-10
categories: [Publication]
---

We have a new <a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.esci.2025.100496" target="_blank">paper</a> in eScience showing how the curvature-rich structure of nitrogen-doped graphene enables asymmetric polysulfide redox catalysis for high-performance lithium-sulfur batteries. Shailendra Sharma contributed to this international collaborative study alongside colleagues from China and the wider team.
